manufacturer_from_details: ‎ Jiangxi AICARE Medical Technology Co., Ltd.
features: Complete Starter Kit: AILE blood sugar test kit includes 1 blood sugar monitor, 100 blood glucose test strips, 1 blood collection device, 100 blood collection needles, 2 AAA batteries and a storage box, providing you with the most affordable and convenient way to test blood glucose

Easy to Use: The blood glucose test kit contains everything you need to perform blood glucose testing. The glucose monitor will automatically start after the blood glucose test strip is properly inserted into the device. The kit provides 5 customizable depth settings, and you can adjust the depth according to your comfort level to ensure that you get the right test depth every time

Easy to Read: The simple 6-step operating system and large screen are easy to read for all users. The high-precision blood glucose monitoring system only requires a small blood sample of 0.7μL, and can track your blood glucose level through test results in less than 5 seconds

Easy to Track: This blood sugar machine can store 99 sets of measurement results, and has a time and date function, allowing you to easily view the average blood glucose values ​​of the past 7, 14, 30 and 90 days, helping you effectively manage your daily blood glucose levels and better adjust your treatment plan

Accurate and Reliable: Our blood glucose meters are equipped with high-performance SOC chips and MAC algorithms, and are paired with advanced oxidase technology test strips. They have strong anti-interference capabilities, ensuring stable and accurate measurement results, allowing you to monitor your blood glucose with peace of mind.
description: Product Description AILE BGM-W33 Blood Glucose Monitoring Kit AILE Blood Glucose Monitor test kit includes 1 blood glucose monitor, 100 test strips, 100 blood collection needles, 1 blood collection pen, 1 product manual, 2 AAA batteries and 1 carrying case. 1. Get test results quickly in 5 seconds 2. Only a small amount of 0.7µL blood sample is required 3. 99 memory sticks to help you monitor test results 4. Provides 7/14/30/90 days average blood sugar test values, easily track daily blood sugar levels and better manage your blood glucose treatment. Previous page Next page 1 Blood Sugar Test Steps 2 Measurement Precautions 3 Frequently Asked Question
